pi_items.source: verifier.py (lines 53-55) awards full points (+20) only if the extracted CSV rows are >= 10.
export_result.sh and task.json explicitly define 1.5 m/s as the target safe velocity (abs(x['vel'] - 1.5)).
task.json and export_result.sh (line 7) strictly expect this exact output file path.
task.json and export_result.sh (line 8) strictly expect this exact output file path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a synthetic CoppeliaSim environment and requires programmatically generating a gravity chute simulation. It has been verified that the agent must sweep a minimum of 10 tilt angles to receive full points, targeting an exit velocity of 1.5 m/s. The verifier dynamically validates the agent's reported optimal angle against its own generated CSV data (verifying self-consistency) rather than checking against an absolute pre-calculated ground truth, as the exact optimal angle depends on the default friction coefficients and geometry applied by the agent's script. All expected output paths exactly match the metadata claims.
